features.evidence: Very nice features almost pure android. always fresh and in active development directly from original Android source- best camera on the marketNeutral:- speed is very slowly improving (if at all)- not many extras in the packaging (e.g., no wall power adapter)- I like bit smaller phones in general (Pixel 5 was an ideal size for me)- AI emphasized too much (and not used at all by me).

The camera is amazing. always fresh and in active development directly from original Android source- best camera on the marketNeutral:- speed is very slowly improving (if at all)- not many extras in the packaging (e.g., no wall power adapter)- I like bit smaller phones in general (Pixel 5 was an ideal size for me)- AI emphasized too much (and not used at all by me).
value: rear facing camera photo sensor resolution: 48 MP

features.evidence: The face recognition and fingerprint features work great on this one. They have done really good at improving the fingerprint sensing abilities.
The battery life is better than iPhone was when it was new. The battery lasts about 24 hours depending on how much I use it.
value: average battery life talk time: 21 Hours

features.evidence: This is a great phone and a great price! Also the price was beyond reasonable when other androids and apple products are well over a thousand dollars
